title: Ambient Particles
body:
- This mod adds cool particles flying around you.

- You can customize the particles however you like. This includes the speed, movement, rendering, particle type, lifetime, size, color, alpha key, and more.

- Requires **Fabric API, Cloth Config API, Mod Menu**.

- Works only on versions 1.20 - 1.21.8.

![Flying particles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecf2048640933cfc174766e63e793e852e1fa578.jpeg)
